input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.3.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.3.2
            TITLE: the maximum permitted voltage that may occur between any two points must not exceed

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.3.2: The maximum permitted voltage that may occur between any two points must not exceed
EV.3.3.2 The maximum permitted voltage that may occur between any two points must not exceed 
600 V DC

final_answer: rule EV.3.3.2: The maximum permitted voltage that may occur between any two points must not exceed 600 V DC
